flu: Get plenty of rest, drink warm fluids, and take paracetamol for fever and body aches.
dengue: Stay hydrated and consult a doctor immediately. Avoid self-medication like aspirin.
common_cold: Drink warm fluids, take steam inhalation, and rest well.
body_pain: Rest and use warm compress. Take mild painkillers if needed.
severe_flu: Consult a doctor immediately and take prescribed medication.
viral_fever: Take rest, drink fluids, and monitor temperature.
bronchitis: Avoid smoke, take steam, and consult a doctor if needed.
fatigue_syndrome: Maintain a balanced diet, sleep well, and reduce stress.
influenza: Get plenty of rest and stay hydrated. Take antiviral medications if prescribed by a doctor. Use paracetamol for fever and body aches. Avoid cold exposure and monitor symptoms like breathing difficulty or high fever.
